headline: Cybersecurity Stocks Face Defining Earnings Catalyst as Okta and Zscaler Diverge
summary: Cybersecurity stocks show market divergence ahead of earnings, with Okta and Fortinet leading, Zscaler struggling, and CrowdStrike as a key bellwether.
